source_pipeline: configs/countries/us.yaml → sync_fiscaldata.py + sync_census_popest.py → raw.us_* → dbt_us_staging → dbt_us_analytics → dbt_us_marts → export_us_national.py

daily_bread.json.description: Receipts by source + outlays by function, latest closed MTS month (current month, FYTD, prior FYTD, per resident)

completeness.note: FYTD figures cover October 2025 through June 2026 — month 9 of 12 of fiscal year 2026. prior_fytd = same window one fiscal year earlier. Each MTS publication restates prior months; this export always reflects the latest publication.

debt_series.json.description: Public debt outstanding — annual FY-end 1790+, month-end 1993+, latest daily observation
